P000.description: Audit novaic-cortex LLM context DFS assembly logic and determine whether it correctly assembles open scopes, folded completed scopes, tool projections, summaries, and ordering without hidden stale paths.
success_criteria: Locate the active code path used to assemble LLM context from Cortex workspace state.
Verify DFS traversal, fold/expand semantics, child summary behavior, and chronological ordering.
Verify current tests cover the important invariants and run focused tests.
Identify concrete bugs or residual design risks with file pointers.
Avoid speculative changes; only recommend or patch if evidence is clear.
P000.title: Cortex LLM DFS context assembly audit

R000.summary: Audited the active novaic-cortex LLM context assembly path and fixed one confirmed structural bug.
verification: Reproduced old open-sibling leak with a minimal script: before patch messages were `["stale input", "current input"]`; after patch messages are `["current input"]`.

acceptance_criteria: Active code path is identified with file/function pointers.
DFS/fold/ordering behavior is explained from implementation evidence.
Test coverage is mapped to the invariants and focused tests are executed.
Any confirmed issue is listed with severity and pointer; if none, residual risks are explicitly named.
T000.classification_reason: bounded audit over context_stack/workspace code and focused tests
T000.problem_definition: Inspect novaic-cortex LLM context assembly from workspace scopes/steps to final messages, with special focus on DFS traversal correctness, scope folding, child ordering, and whether current behavior matches the intended Cortex skill tree model.
T000.proposed_solution:
- Read `context_stack` implementation and related `workspace` context APIs.
- Map the active traversal path: entrypoint, tree build, merge, render, budget.
- Check key invariants: open path expansion, archived scope folding, blank structural scope behavior, child ordering, unconsumed child handling, and tool output projection.
- Read focused tests covering these invariants.
- Run focused test set and report failures if any.
- Produce audit findings and recommendations, separated into confirmed bugs and residual risks.
T000.title: Audit active Cortex DFS context assembly path
T000.verification_plan:
- Run focused novaic-cortex context stack tests.
- Optionally run full novaic-cortex tests if focused tests expose no failure and runtime is acceptable.
- Use `git diff --stat` to ensure only ledger/audit files changed unless a confirmed bug is patched.
